basic_details.job_title: SLBSRSV Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 33 LDC, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Shri Lal Bahadur Shastri National Sanskrit University
basic_details.short_information: Shri Lal Bahadur Shastri National Sanskrit University has released the official Non-Teaching Posts Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 33 vacancies have been announced under the SLBSRSV Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged as per Government of India / UGC rules with qualifications such as 10th Pass, ITI, 10+2, Bachelor’s Degree, Master’s Degree, B.E./B.Tech, MCA/M.Sc (as per post) can apply online. The online application process is currently open and will remain available until 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are avail

age_limit.details: All Posts: As per Government of India / UGC rules for reserved categories, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen, and departmental candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, ITI Pass, 10+2, Bachelor's Degree, Master's Degree, B.E./B.Tech Computer Science/Electronics, MCA/M.Sc Computer Science, Stenography skills, Typing skills, Driving License
qualification.details: Deputy Registrar: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks + 5 years experience as Assistant Registrar or equivalent in Level 10+. Assistant Registrar: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. Section Officer: Bachelor's Degree + 3 years as Assistant Level 6 OR 8 years UDC Level 4 + computer proficiency. Research-Cum-Statistical Officer: Master's in Statistics/Maths/Applied Statistics + 3 years statistical data experience. Assistant Programmer: B.E./B.Tech CSE/EE OR MCA/M.Sc CS + 2 years programming exp. Assistant: Bachelor's Degree + 3 years UDC Level 4 + typing/computer skills. Personal Assistant: Bachelor's + 2 years Stenographer + 100 wpm stenography + 35/30 wpm typing. Laboratory Assistant: Shiksha Shastri/B.Ed/B.A Psychology/B.Ed + 2 years lab exp + computer knowledge. Stenographer: Bachelor's + 80 wpm stenography + 35/30 wpm typing + computer knowledge. Lower Division Clerk (LDC): Bachelor's + 35 wpm English OR 30 wpm Hindi typing + computer proficiency. Staff Car Driver: 10th Pass + valid commercial driving license + 5 years driving exp. Pump Operator: ITI Electrician/Wireman/Fitter OR Matric + 5 years exp in trade. Library Attendant: 10+2 + Library Science certificate + 1 year library exp + basic computer. Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): 10th Pass OR ITI Pass. Laboratory Attendant (PwBD only): 10+2 Science OR 10th Science + lab tech certificate.

selection_process: min 50% for Group B & C) Interview (for Group A)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SLBSRSV Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SLBSRSV to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SLBSRSV Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Shri Lal Bahadur Shastri National Sanskrit University Non-Teaching posts is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching posts at SLBSRSV?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies announced for various Non-Teaching positions at Shri Lal Bahadur Shastri National Sanskrit University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: For Group A posts, the application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 2000/-. For Group B & C posts, it is Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any relaxations in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per Government of India / UGC rules for reserved categories, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), Ex-Servicemen, and departmental candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for MTS posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) posts is 10th Pass or ITI Pass.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test (qualifying) for Group B & C posts, and an Interview for Group A posts.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi, but it's advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary range for the Non-Teaching posts?
faq.answer: The salary for these Non-Teaching posts ranges from Rs. 18000 to Rs. 209200 per month, as per the university's pay scales.

faq.question: Q9. Is there a specific qualification for the Laboratory Attendant (PwBD only) post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Laboratory Attendant (PwBD only) post, candidates need to have completed 10+2 Science or 10th Science with a lab technician certificate.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
